title: Heim-PC operator hygiene follow-ups
goal: Close the remaining Heim-PC service hygiene gaps found in the 2026-07-08 live audit without weakening Operator Relay boundaries or making blind runtime claims.
completion: Broken cloud mounts either reconnect cleanly or remain disabled without restart loops.
Grabowski operator watchdog probes are non-disruptive and cannot restart a healthy live MCP service because of transient probe failures.
Privileged stale-systemd cleanup has a narrow broker-mediated path or a documented manual path.
Wide Heim-PC listeners are classified as intentional, LAN-only, Tailnet-only, localhost-only or removed.

metadata.source: Live Heim-PC service audit from ChatGPT/Grabowski on 2026-07-08
metadata.verified_listener_hygiene_20260711: OPERATOR-PC-HYGIENE-V1-T004 verified: Infra PR #116 records complete observed wildcard-listener classification, closure of 4173/4174 and loopback-only Leitstand deployment from PR #161. Router forwarding and complete firewall policy remain unverified.
metadata.closeout_status: T004-T007 are verified. T001-T003 and T008-T011 remain planned or blocked; initiative remains active.

remaining_audit_followups_20260711.T007: tmux session lifecycle and transcript-preserving reviewed cleanup
remaining_audit_followups_20260711.T009: consumer-based necessity review for retained LAN listeners

metadata.registration_boundary: All four tasks remain planned/later and do not authorize session termination, service disablement, firewall/router changes or process termination.
metadata.verified_state_and_tmux_hygiene_20260711: T006 and T007 verified: Bureau state root is clean via reversible quarantine; 29 idle tmux shells were transcript-preserved and closed while 30 active/uncertain sessions remained.
metadata.verified_node_runtime_20260711: T005 verified via Infra PRs #117/#118, live release 0fc7a0f30ec47aaf84774e3721e514c86059774e and runtime evidence PR #119.
metadata.server_recovery_freshness_followup_20260: T011 registers the real configured-target backup/restore/repository probe needed to refresh stale server recovery evidence. No fallback, marker touch or gate bypass is authorized.
